synopsis:
An anthology of stories set during the events of *The Empire Strikes Back* and *Return of the Jedi*, told from the perspective of the bounty hunters Darth Vader hires to hunt down Han Solo and the *Millennium Falcon*. Each tale follows one of the six hunters, uniting them in their lust for profit and their contempt for life. The collection includes:

- "Therefore I Am: The Tale of IG-88"
- "Payback: The Tale of Dengar"
- "The Prize Pelt: The Tale of Bossk"
- "Of Possible Futures: The Tale of Zuckuss and 4-LOM"
- "The Last One Standing: The Tale of Boba Fett"
title: Tales of the Bounty Hunters
